programmes.show_description: This programme is part of Arirang TV's efforts to promote Korean culture and provide a window into the country's dynamic art scene for a global audience.
There is a growing interest in Korean literature among readers from around the world and so we bring Korean classics to Korean modern literature to viewers in this special series under three themes.
Dive into Korean culture with Arirang TV.
Business documentary series introducing a variety of domestic small and medium-sized companies that have achieved continuous growth based on the smart factory project provided by Samsung Electronics.
Join us on a journey into the everyday lives of the most outstanding scientists in Korea; what were the joys of science they discovered after repeated failures, and what did they realise from them?
Take a relaxed stroll around the neighbourhood with Drawing Diary. Exploring the history of familiar places and uncovering hidden gems, the programme captures the everyday scenery of Korea.
A cultural heritage walk accompanied by Maltese Byeol-yi and Yorkshire Terrier Kka-mi.
